How It Works

Shop with purpose, every time

Every purchase on SHOPZI directly supports a skilled artisan and a portion goes to our community impact fund.

🔍

Discover

Browse unique handcrafted products and skilled services from artisans around the community.

🛒

Shop

Add to cart and checkout securely. Every purchase empowers a real person and their family.

💚

Impact

A portion of every sale funds our social causes — supporting the sick, orphaned, and communities in need.

📦

Receive

Get your order delivered. Track it every step of the way with real-time updates.

Featured Products

Handpicked for you

Quality products made with care, each one with a story behind it.

Artisan Stories

Meet the makers

Real people, real skills, real impact. Every artisan has a story worth hearing.

🧶

Amara Diallo

Knitwear & Textiles

"SHOPZI gave me my first online customers. In 6 months, I went from selling at the local market to shipping across the country."

🏺

Kwame Asante

Ceramics & Pottery

"I was struggling to pay rent before joining. Now I have steady orders and I'm teaching three young people from my neighbourhood."

🎨

María López

Visual Art & Prints

"The platform helped me turn my passion into a profession. Now my art reaches people I never imagined."

Every purchase creates a ripple of change

When you buy on SHOPZI, 10% of the platform's proceeds go directly to supporting vulnerable communities — funding healthcare, education, and emergency aid.

🏥

Healthcare support for families who can't afford treatment

👦

Orphan care and education programs

🌱

Skills training for unemployed young people

🤝

Emergency relief for communities in crisis

A social-impact marketplace empowering artisans and skilled workers while supporting vulnerable communities through every transaction.

Marketplace

© 2025 SHOPZI Express · Empowering Artisans

For Artisans & Skilled Workers

Turn your skills into a sustainable income

Join over 1,200 artisans already earning on SHOPZI. Set up your shop in minutes — no technical experience needed.

🏪

How to get started

Your shop in 4 steps

📝

Create your account

Sign up with your name, email, and phone. It takes less than 2 minutes.

🏪

Set up your shop

Add your shop name, story, and profile photo. Let buyers know who they're buying from.

📸

Upload your products

Add photos, descriptions, and prices. We'll help you showcase your work at its best.

💰

Start earning

Go live and start receiving orders. Payments are deposited directly to your account.

Create your seller account

Join the SHOPZI community and start reaching customers today

© 2025 SHOPZI Express · Empowering Artisans

Our Social Impact

Every transaction changes a life

SHOPZI is more than a marketplace. It's a movement to create sustainable livelihoods and support the most vulnerable in our communities.

🧑‍🎨1,240Artisans Empowered
💰$420KIncome Generated
👨‍👩‍👧340Families Supported
🏥82Medical Cases Funded
📚215Children in Education
🌍18Communities Reached

Where your money goes

10% of every sale on SHOPZI funds these active causes

🏥

Community Healthcare Fund

Covering medical bills for families who cannot afford treatment for serious illnesses.

$36,000 raisedGoal: $50,000
👦

Orphan Education Program

School fees, books, and meals for orphaned children in underserved communities.

$29,000 raisedGoal: $50,000
🌱

Youth Skills Training

Free vocational training for unemployed young people to build careers in skilled trades.

$42,500 raisedGoal: $50,000
🤝

Emergency Relief Fund

Rapid response aid for communities facing sudden crises — food, shelter, and essentials.

$20,500 raisedGoal: $50,000
